judge_result.short_rationale: Matches the canonical eye-exposure actions in the correct order: rinse eyes 15-20 minutes, then remove contact lenses after 5 minutes if present. The added do-not-stop warning is grounded. Escalation is slightly broader than the source trigger but remains safe and usable.
